notes: Examine.com evidence-based summary; 44 references, 16 trials, 1503 participants; covers memory, cognition, anxiety; standard dose 300mg/day; last updated 2025
2012 systematic review of RCTs; finds some evidence for memory free recall improvement; other cognitive domains inconsistent; early research stage
2024 systematic review; confirms neuroprotective mechanisms (anti-apoptotic, antioxidant, synaptic repair); limited direct human cognitive outcome data
2025 RCT Bacumen® 300mg, 12 weeks, n=87; no improvement in cognitive outcomes vs placebo; significant reduction in stress reactivity (p=0.03); well-designed trial
